description: Create an animation showing 3 sorting algorithms (Bubble, Quick, Merge) on the same input array.
prompt: I am a computer science teaching assistant, and I want to create a visual demonstration of sorting algorithms for an introductory algorithms course. Please create an animation showing 3 sorting algorithms operating on the same input array [38, 27, 43, 3, 9, 82, 10]. The animation should have 3 clearly separated segments: (1) Bubble Sort — highlighting each comparison and swap, (2) Quick Sort — highlighting pivot selection and partitioning, (3) Merge Sort — showing recursive splitting and merging. Display the algorithm name and time complexity at the start of each segment. Use distinct colors: yellow for elements being compared, green for elements in their sorted position, and red for the pivot. Output sorting_animation.mp4 and sorting_results.json (containing input_array, sorted_array, and each algorithm's comparisons and swaps count).

evaluators.description: Check that sorting_results.json is valid JSON
Check that JSON has input_array and sorted_array
